Referral Program

Earn 7% Commission on Every Referral

At ZX3.io, we believe in rewarding our users for spreading the word about our platform. Our referral program is simple and rewarding: Invite your friends and connections to join ZX3.io using your unique referral link.
Earn 7% commission on every trading plan they activate, credited directly to your account. No limits on how many referrals you can make or how much you can earn.
ZX3 TRADE SMARTER
DECENTRALIZED A.I
MEME COINS MAGIC
AUTOMATED PROFITS
24H DAILY RETURNS
Frequently Asked Questions

FAQ

ZX3 is an automated, decentralized trading platform powered by advanced AI bots. Specializing in meme coins and altcoins, it uses cutting-edge technology to analyze markets, execute trades, and deliver consistent daily profits—all while maintaining user control and transparency.
This phrasing emphasizes the technology and innovation behind ZX3 while setting it apart from traditional asset management platforms.

To simplify operations and maintain transparency, ZX3 uses USDT as the primary currency. This ensures consistent calculations for deposits, earnings, and statistics across multiple cryptocurrencies. Even if the value of a specific crypto fluctuates, users receive returns based on current rates, preserving their investment’s value.

ZX3 operates on decentralized systems, ensuring that funds are secure and transactions are transparent. Additionally, our AI bots are optimized for low-risk, high-efficiency trading strategies, giving users peace of mind while maximizing profits.

Yes! ZX3 offers flexibility by allowing users to cancel their investment plans at any time. A 5% fee is charged to cover operational costs, but you’re free to withdraw your funds whenever you need them.

ZX3 offers variable daily profit rates depending on the chosen investment plan. Rates range from 3.2% to 8% daily, powered by our AI bots that analyze and execute trades across meme coins and altcoins. Profits are calculated based on successful trading activity and market conditions. Users receive their daily profits every 24 hours in their account balance and can withdraw these profits daily if they wish.

ZX3 stands out with its focus on meme coins and altcoins, leveraging fast-moving markets for extraordinary profits. Our platform combines AI-driven precision, decentralized security, and a user-friendly experience, offering unmatched flexibility and reliability.
